stages.title: Register Sanctum active task
stages.purpose: Зафиксировать задачу, scope, stage map, pass criteria, next allowed action.

stages.title: Sanctum address and read-first map
stages.purpose: Дать адреса Astra Utility, Explorer, Sanctum root, notes, screenshots, receipts, artifacts.

stages.title: Sanctum scripts and validators map
stages.purpose: Определить compile/json/screenshot/manifest/hash/bundle/check scripts для ручной сборки Sanctum.

stages.title: Sanctum anti-heresy preflight
stages.purpose: Проверить no fake green, no source-of-truth claim, no live organs, no VM2/THRONE/E2E/watchers/delete.

stages.title: Manual Sanctum iteration
stages.purpose: Ручная доработка Sanctum v0.1/v0.x по Owner решениям, с receipts, screenshots, notes, bugs and fixes.

stages.title: Hard review after Owner candidate
stages.purpose: Speculum проверяет artifact only after Owner decides version is candidate-worthy.
